LanguageData.VFED_AerodroneStation.label: 垂直站
LanguageData.VFED_DeadDrop.description: A dead drop from our Brotherhood expeditionary contact.
LanguageData.VFED_EmpireRuins.description: The former flagship of the Whitespring Enclave, now crashed.
LanguageData.VFED_EmpireRuins.label: 科瓦克-馬爾登平台殘骸
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialConvoy.label: 白泉車隊
LanguageData.VFED_PlotMission_DownedShuttle.descripti: 一架被擊落的飛鳥載著一名白泉市高級官員。
LanguageData.VFED_PlotMission_DownedShuttle.label: 擊落XVB02
LanguageData.VFED_PlotMission_Raid.label: 軍官莊園
LanguageData.VFED_ShuttleStagingPost.label: 飛鳥中轉站
LanguageData.VFED_TechPrinter.label: 資料列印中心
LanguageData.VFED_Underfarm.label: 懷特斯普林農場下
LanguageData.VFED_ZeusCannonComplex.description: A secret Whitespring installation equipped with a large number of powerful orbital cannons, capable of bringing down large objects from the orbit.
LanguageData.VFED_ZeusCannonComplex.label: 軌道炮複合體
